reviews.comment:
Bien los playeros. Combustible barato. El kiosco mal, te cobran lo que quieren y carísimo.  Agregan cargos que no existen para la compra de cigarrillos o caramelos.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants are good. Fuel is cheap. The kiosk is bad; they charge whatever they want, and it's ridiculously expensive. They add unnecessary charges for buying cigarettes or candy.

reviews.comment:
Una de las mejores atención al cliente que vi.
El servicio es rápido, todos muy educados y te atienden desde el auto para evitar que bajes.
Muy serviciales.

(Translated by Google)
One of the best customer service experiences I've ever had.
The service is fast, everyone is very polite, and they even serve you from your car so you don't have to get out.
Very helpful.
